arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Transfer target drops hint as Virgil van Dijk reveals Arsenal plan
arts.sum: Liverpool are on the verge of winning the Premier League and an Arsenal defeat to Crystal Palace at the Emirates could see Virgil van Dijk and Luis Diaz celebrating on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed huge Nico Williams transfer plan as double update issued
arts.sum: Attention will also begin to turn towards the summer transfer window with Arteta's men being linked with moves for Nico Williams, Dean Huijsen and Nathan Collins among others. Isaac Seelochan of football.london says: "Nico Williams would be an excellent signing for Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Ethan Nwaneri's big reveal as club urged to sign 'incredible' star
arts.sum: Arsenal play Crystal Palace on Wednesday night in their final Premier League game before facing off against PSG in the Champions League semi-finals - and it's a crucial one as they bid to prevent Liverpool winning the title

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta drops two hints over Arsenal team for Champions League fixture vs PSG
arts.sum: Arsenal face the biggest game in their recent history against French giants Paris Saint-Germain next week and it appears that Mikel Arteta is already putting thought into his starting XI

arts.ttl: Arsenal to 'assess options' in transfer market for midfield reinforcements after staff raise concerns about performance levels
arts.sum: Arsenal will reportedly look at possible options in midfield in the upcoming summer transfer window due to concerns regarding the performances of one of their stars.

arts.ttl: PSG boss Luis Enrique dismisses major Arsenal threat in unflattering Liverpool comparison
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain boss Luis Enrique has compared Arsenal's ability from set-pieces to that of Liverpool and is not planning on spending extra time pouring over the Gunners' routines

arts.ttl: Arsenal win Gyokeres race as €150m deal takes shape
arts.sum: Plus, Chelsea faced a new threat for Liam Delap and Ruben Amorim confirmed that Man Utd need Victor Osimhen . Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim has admitted that he needs a prolific striker like Victor Osimhen.

arts.ttl: 'Mind blowing': Paul Merson once blasted Mikel Arteta for making one big Arsenal change, he was so wrong
arts.sum: Those comments look really silly now...

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Key Gunners target REJECTS summer move
arts.sum: Kounde has established himself as a key figure at Barcelona since the appointment of Flick last summer, and he is reportedly in talks to sign a new contract at Camp Nou. The France international has been linked with a shock move to the Emirates Stadium in recent weeks, as Mikel Arteta looks for further defensive reinforcements, but Kounde has rejected a move to north London in favour of extending his stay at Camp Nou.

arts.ttl: Sverre Nypan: Arsenal snub exposes specific Gunners transfer failing amid Aston Villa 'progress'
arts.sum: Arsenal journalist Charles Watts explains why he is not "losing sleep" over the Gunners missing out on the signature of talented Rosenborg midfielder Sverre Nypan.
